message:
feat(err): wire write_err_message to delegate to core (bd-err-2)

Sub-bead 2 of bd-err-epic. Replaces 32 lines of inline byte-
formatting in err_abi.rs::write_err_message with a 14-line shim
that calls frankenlibc_core::err::format_err_message (added in
bd-err-1). Also removes local basename_bytes in favor of the
core re-export.

The abi layer remains responsible for:
- rendering printf templates via stdio_abi::render_printf
- looking up errno via strerror_bytes
- atomically writing to fd 2 via unistd_abi::write
- saving/restoring errno across the call

All 7 err_h conformance tests pass with no regression:
- err_h_diff_coverage_report
- errx_child_invocation, diff_errx_exit_and_body
- diff_progname_source_matches_glibc (DISC-ERR-001 still fixed)
- diff_warn_errno_suffix, diff_warnx_formatted_args,
  diff_warnx_message_body

Closes bd-err-2; bd-err-3 will close out the epic with verification.
